mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID, TITLE, DESC, SORT_ORDER, REG_DTTM, REG_ID, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_ID, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN FROM BOARD_MASTER WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
SELECT BOARD_ID, TITLE, DESC, SORT_ORDER, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN FROM BOARD_MASTER WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_MASTER ( BOARD_ID, TITLE, DESC, SORT_ORDER, REG_DTTM, REG_USER, REG_IP, UPD_DTTM, UPD_USER, UPD_IP, DEL_YN, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{title}, #{desc}, #{sortOrder}, #{regDttm}, #{regUser}, #{regIp}, #{updDttm}, #{updUser}, #{updIp}, 'N', 'Y' )
